mechanism: Aging-driven fiscal deterioration increases Treasury supply at 10Y-30Y maturities. Fiscal supply elasticity of 20-40bp per 1pp deficit/GDP translates higher deficits into higher term premium, though the elasticity may not hold post-QE or for reserve currency issuers.
regime_dependence: Established in pre-QE regressions. May be attenuated for reserve currency issuers. Strengthens when multiple major economies deteriorate simultaneously (no safety valve).
